revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Underused external link template]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Underused external link template]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Underused external link template]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Underused external link template]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Underused external link template]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Underused external link template]]</includeonly>

{{Ombox | type = notice | text = This external link template is underused, compared to the number of links to {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[{{{1|}}} the site it represents] ({{enum|{{linksearch|{{{1|}}}|check here}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{2|}}}|here}}|}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{3|}}}|here}}|}}}})|the resource it represents}}. Please help convert those links to make use of this template, for ease of tracking, and ease of interoperability with [[Wikidata]]. }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|[[Category:External link templates with potential for greater use]]|}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Ombox | type = notice | text = This external link template is underused, compared to the number of links to {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[{{{1|}}} the site it represents] ({{enum|{{linksearch|{{{1|}}}|check here}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{2|}}}|here}}|}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{3|}}}|here}}|}}}})|the resource it represents}}. Please help convert those links to make use of this template, for ease of tracking, and ease of interoperability with [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]]. }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|[[Category:External link templates with potential for greater use]]|}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Ombox | type = notice | text = This external link template is underused, compared to the number of links to {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[{{{1|}}} the site it represents] ({{enum|{{linksearch|{{{1|}}}|check here}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{2|}}}|here}}|}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{3|}}}|here}}|}}}})|the resource it represents}}. Please help convert those links to make use of this template, for ease of tracking, and ease of interoperability with [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]]. }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|[[Category:External link templates with potential for greater use]]|}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Ombox | type = notice | text = This external link template is underused, compared to the number of links to {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[{{{1|}}} the site it represents] ({{enum|{{linksearch|{{{1|}}}|check here}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{2|}}}|here}}|}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{3|}}}|here}}|}}}})|the resource it represents}}. revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{Ombox | type = notice | text = This external link template is underused, compared to the number of links to {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[{{{1|}}} the site it represents] ({{enum|{{linksearch|{{{1|}}}|check here}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{2|}}}|here}}|}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{linksearch|{{{3|}}}|here}}|}}}})|the resource it represents}}. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
